hero.title: Decision Maker
hero.description: Compare real options with criteria, weights, ratings, and transparent results while keeping human judgment in control.

flow.title: Frame → Evaluate → Decide
steps: Describe a decision and add options
Weight criteria and rate every active pair
Review transparent results and record your choice

differences.title: Structured thinking, not automated advice
differences.description: Every option, criterion, weight, and rating comes from the user.

items.title: Capture real trade-offs
items.description: Record pros, cons, risks, assumptions, and notes.

items.title: Inspect every contribution
items.description: Normalized weights and direction-aware ratings stay visible.

items.title: Keep human judgment
items.description: Select any active option and record outcomes without a guaranteed-best claim.

feel.title: Transparent and neutral
feel.description: Incomplete ratings, ties, and non-top selections are presented honestly.

items.title: Bounded
items.description: No AI recommendation, voting, random choice, or professional advice.

audiences.title: Who uses it
audiences.description: For individuals and small-business users comparing meaningful alternatives.

items.title: Professionals
items.description: Compare roles, suppliers, or project approaches.

items.title: Consumers
items.description: Evaluate purchases, apartments, vehicles, or courses.

items.title: Planners
items.description: Review destinations, goals, and other personal choices.

items.title: Criteria
items.description: Positive weights, normalized shares, and higher/lower direction.

items.title: Results
items.description: Completion, contributions, scores, ties, ranking, and selection.

groupedSection.title: Clear scoring boundaries
groupedSection.description: The matrix remains inspectable from input to result.

items.name: Weights
items.description: Normalize proportionally without forcing a total of 100.

items.name: Incomplete options
items.description: Show completion but no score or rank.

items.name: Ties
items.description: Share rank without a secret scoring advantage.

technicalSection.title: Isolated and owner scoped
technicalSection.description: Protected nested APIs keep private reasoning within its decision.
items: Decimal scoring and stable generated contracts.
